## What this PR changes

A one-sentence description.

## Type of change

- [ ] New banned word or phrase in `references/banned-list.md`
- [ ] New example pair in `references/examples.md`
- [ ] New rewrite pattern in `references/rewrites.md`
- [ ] Skill workflow change in `SKILL.md`
- [ ] Spanish (or other language) addition
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## Sources or rationale

For new banned items: paste links to public examples (three or more, from different sources where possible).

For new examples: explain the move the rewrite illustrates.

## House style check

- [ ] No em dashes, en dashes, or standalone hyphens in my own prose. Em dashes inside quoted material or as the subject of a sentence about em dashes are allowed.
- [ ] No compound-word hyphens.
- [ ] No banned words from the master list appear in my own running prose.
- [ ] Read aloud. Sounds like a sharp human.
- [ ] If I added an example, the "Before" actually contains the banned pattern it claims to illustrate.
